```{r}
library(pacman)
p_load(data.table, dplyr, DT)
```

# Samples {.tabset}

## RNAseq 

```{r}
d <- fread("input/RNA_samples_251104.txt")


datatable(
  d,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf", "print"),
    pageLength = -1,                 # show ALL rows
    lengthMenu = list(c(-1, 10, 25, 50), c("All", 10, 25, 50)),
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    rowCallback = JS(
        "function(row, data) {
          for (var i = 0; i < row.cells.length; i++) {
            row.cells[i].style.padding = '2px 6px';
          }
        }"
      )
  )
) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "COMP",
    target = "row",
    backgroundColor = styleEqual(
      c("Y", "G", "B", "R", "O", "P", "W"),
      c("yellow", "green", "lightblue", "red", "orange", "pink", "white")
    )
  )
```
